title: Event Envelope Contract
description: The 5-dimension WHEN/ATOP_WHICH/THROUGH_WHICH/BY_WHOM/WITH_WHAT event-log envelope shape (P230 section 3.1/3.3: 'when, atopWhich, throughWhich, byWhom, withWhat'), append-only per ADR-006. `withWhat` alone is intentionally open (event-type-specific payload); every other field is closed. Runtime-neutral. Real content P330.

envelopeRev.description: Per-row envelope revision, keyed for the on-read upcaster seam (ADR-006); legitimately empty upcaster registry at v1 is acceptable, an absent envelopeRev is not.

type.description: The discriminated event type. Open vocabulary (the legacy plugin alone carries 85 variants) — this contract fixes the envelope shape, not the closed set of type values.

atopWhich.description: The target/subject this event occurred atop.

throughWhich.description: The mechanism (tool, hook, handler) this event occurred through.

withWhat.description: Event-type-specific payload. May carry `memoryLayers` (Four typed memory forms, execution-plan.md DoD item 8) tagging which agentic memory layer(s) this envelope feeds.
